narrative:
Zanesville City has 13,118 registered voters, with 63.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 19.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 17.4%, a narrow Republican lean of 1.8 percentage points.
